args.command:
configure terminal
ip access-list extended BLOCK_ICMP_UBUNTU
deny icmp host 192.168.1.3 host 7.0.14.254
permit ip any any
interface Gi0/1
ip access-group BLOCK_ICMP_UBUNTU in
end
show access-lists BLOCK_ICMP_UBUNTU
